creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
This upgrades cdindex from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0.

1.2.0 should be the final version of CD Index.

Future development is going into MusicBrainz, which
replaces cdindex. (A libmusicbrainz PR is forthcoming.)

MusicBrainz will be backwards compatible with the cdindex
clients so it couldn't hurt to have the final version in
the collection for those who prefer this CLI program to the
MusicBrainz client library.

I waited a week to send this PR after mailing
the current MAINTAINER, Marc E E van Woerkom.  I
appologize in advance for stepping on any toes.
